_fixture_provenance.what: REDUCED SCHEMA FIXTURE for ui/tests/extract_seam.test.py — exercises the extract_board_view.py UI/release seam. NOT a production board and NOT an accepted valuation oracle.
_fixture_provenance.derivation: Authentic byte-for-byte slices of the source board's extractor-relevant keys (active[:30], back[:5], picks[:5], PVC full, lensPicks[:8], lensConservation full, phantomLayer[:3 clubs], phantomPicks[:8], phantomTotals[_meta+league+clubs(kept 3)], BASE_YEAR). The ~40 engine-parameter keys the extractor never reads are dropped. No value is fabricated or recomputed. The sealed phantomTotals._meta (entrant_layer_pvc 83538, expected_slots_per_year 103.43, seal_sha256_8 a17aafed) is preserved verbatim.
_fixture_provenance.reason: The source commit 6720dfae is dangling in GitHub's object DB and is NOT reachable from any advertised branch/tag; Actions fetch-depth:0 cannot supply it, so the test's runtime `git show` was non-portable. This committed fixture removes that dependency (no git/network at test time).

_meta.basis: PVC face value on future picks; no future-discount dial (deferred, item 12)
_meta.principle: year-0 continuity: value converts, does not vanish (item 12)

_meta.basis: per club + league, per lens (bal/+1/+2), WITH vs WITHOUT the phantom layer
_meta.exit_model: exit risk carried by r_pop (§2.ix, F4 — incl exiters residuals); no §2.iii haircut, no double-count
_meta.law: MEMO_LEGF v1.3 §2.viii (owner item 359): FULL expected annual intake at v2-curve PVC per effective pick
_meta.note: draft slots priced off PVC per effective pick (v2 curve, GROSS); mechanisms at PICKEQ 90/92; no wide/decile bins (CORE rule 7); sealed from intake history, NOT tuned against the §2.x gate
_meta.per_lens: each forward lens carries ONE annual entrant class on top of the r_pop-retained roster; +2 is the marginal-annual view and runs slightly under now (declared caveat, item-12 lens-conservation)
